category_sources: source_facts.description says Kubescape tests Kubernetes according to NSA and CISA hardening guidance; official Kubescape site describes it as an open-source Kubernetes security platform.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kubescape; official website and documentation use Kubescape.
docs_sources: Official Kubescape website provides a dedicated docs section and getting-started documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape, so repository was not re-determined.
